title: Celebrations and Festivals Game Zone
source: Generated from approved unit runtime and linked master dictionary

games.title: Meaning Match
games.description: Match each unit word to its approved child-friendly meaning.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: Kind and generous; wanting to help others.
choices: benevolent
determined
industrious
rounds.answer: benevolent
rounds.explanation: benevolent: Kind and generous; wanting to help others.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: Not giving up easily; holding on with great determination.
choices: benevolent
determined
tenacious
rounds.answer: tenacious
rounds.explanation: tenacious: Not giving up easily; holding on with great determination.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: Important and well-known.
choices: determined
prominent
benevolent
rounds.answer: prominent
rounds.explanation: prominent: Important and well-known.

games.title: Sentence Puzzle
games.description: Put unit words into the correct sentence order.

rounds.answer: The benevolent woman donated food to the homeless shelter.
The legendary hero saved the village from the dragon.
After their argument, they talked and tried to reconcile their differences.

games.title: Language Choice
games.description: Choose the form that makes the unit language accurate.

choices: A person or thing that is a perfect example of a particular quality.
Being on time; not late.
Brave and not afraid of danger or difficulty.
Very careful and paying great attention to details.
rounds.answer: Brave and not afraid of danger or difficulty.
rounds.explanation: The intrepid explorer climbed the highest mountain without fear.
